item.title: (1964) Where Did Our Love Go
item.description: Artist: The Supremes Released: August 31, 1964 Label: Motown Records Producer: Holland-Dozier-Holland Genre: Primary: Girl group, Motown sound RYM · Apple Music · Spotify The title track opens with foot stomps, handclaps, and a baritone saxophone riff so simple it barely qualifies as a melody, and ...
